requirement_topic.en: Solar Inverter EMI, EMC, and Anti-Islanding Behavior
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏逆变器电磁干扰、EMC 与防孤岛行为
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏逆變器電磁干擾、EMC 與防孤島行為

summary.en: North Macedonia projects commonly require both EMC compliance and anti-islanding logic for grid-connected solar inverters. IEC 61000-6 series emissions and immunity evidence and IEC 62116/IEC 62109 protective behavior are relevant where the model is supplied into public low-voltage networks; required settings and accepted routes must be confirmed against ERC and MEPSO project expectations.
summary.zh: 北马其顿项目通常要求并网光伏逆变器具备 EMC 合规与防孤岛逻辑。IEC 61000-6 系列的发射与抗扰度证据及 IEC 62116、IEC 62109 的保护行为是相关依据；所需参数及可接受路线必须按 ERC 与 MEPSO 项目要求确认。
summary.zht: 北馬其頓項目通常要求併網光伏逆變器具備 EMC 符合性與防孤島邏輯。IEC 61000-6 系列發射與抗干擾度證據及 IEC 62116、IEC 62109 的保護行為是相關依據；所需參數及可接受路徑必須依 ERC 與 MEPSO 專案要求確認。

summary.en: China inverter baselines commonly use GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 test evidence for grid behavior and protection checks. Those reports can support technical comparison but do not replace North Macedonia route-specific EMC evidence, anti-islanding settings, and project-commissioning checks.
summary.zh: 中国逆变器基线通常使用 GB/T 37408 和 GB/T 19964 的测试证据用于电网行为和保护检查。这些报告可支持技术比较，但不能替代北马其顿项目特定的 EMC 证据、防孤岛参数和投运核查。
summary.zht: 中國逆變器基線通常使用 GB/T 37408 與 GB/T 19964 的測試證據，用於電網行為與保護檢查。這些報告可支持技術比較，但不能取代北馬其頓項目特定的 EMC 證據、防孤島參數及投運核查。

standards_or_laws: China inverter grid-compliance and EMC test evidence

gap.en: The gap is complete country profile control. Exporters should map North Macedonia-specific voltage/frequency windows, over/under-voltage and frequency protections, anti-islanding test reports, and EMC installation assumptions against project commissioning evidence rather than assuming default China profiles are accepted.
gap.zh: 差距在于完整国家配置控制。出口商应将北马其顿特定电压/频率窗口、过欠压与过欠频保护、 防孤岛测试报告、EMC 安装假设与项目投运证据对应，而非默认接受中国默认配置。
gap.zht: 差距在於完整的國家設定控制。出口商應將北馬其頓特定電壓/頻率窗、過欠壓與過欠頻保護、防孤島測試報告、EMC 安裝假設與項目投運證據對應，而非默認中國預設設定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where project grid-connection routes require EMC/anti-islanding behavior and project commissioning evidence
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T evidence supports engineering comparison only and is not North Macedonia approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not reuse default China anti-islanding and EMC profiles for North Macedonia deployment without a project-level Turkish-like route check adapted to ERC and MEPSO expectations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不要在未按ERC与MEPSO期望进行项目级复核的情况下沿用中国默认防孤岛与EMC配置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 未依 ERC 與 MEPSO 期待進行項目級複核前，不可沿用中國預設之防孤島與 EMC 設定。
